RRRules.GeneralRules1: Rooster Rumble is a 6-reel, 4-row (with an additional row for each of reel 2, 3, 4 and 5) video slot featuring sticky Wild Symbols and win multiplier.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{10000} ways (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{10000} ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 10.

RRRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

RRCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination1: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
RRCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination2: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
RRCommonRules.WildsExplaination1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
RRCommonRules.WildsExplaination2: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.

RRMultiplier.Title: Multiplier
RRMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination1: At the start of any main game spin, the win multiplier is x1.
RRMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination2: During any spin, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be increased by 1.

RRStickyWildSymbols.Title: Sticky Wild Symbols
RRStickyWildSymbols.StickyWildSymbolsExplaination1: The number indicated on the Wild symbol represents the number of the times the Wild symbol can be used in a winning combination before it destroys itself.
RRStickyWildSymbols.StickyWildSymbolsExplaination2: Any Wild symbol that appears on the reels will start with the value of 2, 3 or blank.
RRStickyWildSymbols.StickyWildSymbolsExplaination3: If a Wild symbol is involved in a win and the number at the top portion of the Wild symbol indicates a value of 2 or more, the Wild symbol will not destroy itself in the next round and that value will be deducted by 1.
RRStickyWildSymbols.StickyWildSymbolsExplaination4: If a Wild symbol is involved in a win and the number at the top portion of the Wild symbol indicates as blank, the Wild symbol will destroy itself in the next round.

RRFreeSpinRules.Title: Free Spins Feature
RRFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 8 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
RRFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the win multiplier is x2.
RRFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination3: During any free spin, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be increased by 2.
RRFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination4: Any Wild symbol that appears on the reels will start with the value of 5.
